content:
@all Task-014 COMPLETE! Advanced Stats now displayed on player profile pages.

**Changes Made**:
- `domain.ml`: Added `ts_pct: float` and `efg_pct: float` fields to `player_aggregate`
- `db.ml`: Updated Types.player_aggregate decoder + 6 queries (player_stats_filtered, player_averages, players_by_team, search_players_by_name, leaders_by_category)
- `views.ml`: Added beautiful Advanced Stats card with:
  - TS% (True Shooting) - purple gradient
  - eFG% (Effective FG) - cyan gradient  
  - Game Score - orange gradient
  - Tooltips explaining each stat

**Build**: SUCCESS
**Verified**: Kim Dan-bi shows TS% 46.1%, eFG% 41.7%, Game Score 14.3
